items.title: Iran says deal to end fighting with US has 'never been closer'
items.summary: Both Iran and Pakistan say a deal has never been closer - echoing US President Donald Trump's statement on Thursday.

items.title: French town buries murdered child as questions mount over police failings
items.summary: The prime suspect in the killing of Lyhanna, 11, was reported to police nine months prior but never questioned.

items.title: Discovery of €1.2m jewellery prompts fresh probe into former Spanish PM
items.summary: José Luis Rodriguez Zapatero is suspected of being unable to show proof he paid import duties on the jewellery.

items.title: Retail spending fell in March as consumers pull back
items.summary: Spending at US retailers fell in March as consumers pulled back amid recessionary fears fueled by the banking crisis.

items.title: 美伊和平協議近完成　美官員：8成以上機率近日簽署
items.summary: 巴基斯坦總理夏立夫（Shehbaz Sharif）今天表示，美國與伊朗和平協議的最終文本已獲各方同意；美國官員則稱，有80%至85%機率在數日內與伊朗簽署協議。  綜合法新社報導，夏立夫在社...…

items.title: 美國德州槍擊案警匪對峙！11人中槍1人身亡
items.summary: 美國德州週五發生槍擊案，警匪對峙，已知11人受害，至少1人當場身亡。警方目前與1名嫌犯對峙中。根據市政府臉書、X平台的最新資訊，嫌犯已身亡，但事件發生原因、嫌犯身分仍不明。  ...…

items.title: 美中脫鉤擴大！紐時：SpaceX上市募資全面排除中國資金
